Appearances:
Vladie P. Viltman, Esq. of the Law Office of Brian E. Soriano, Tel. 415.593.7333, for plaintiffs and moving party MAHESH GOGRI and SHILPA GOGRI;
Hee Young Lee, Esq. of Herman & Lee, LLP, Tel. 415.870.7075 ext. 6592, for defendant SCOTTSDALE INSURANCE, by Court Call.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was discussed and argued. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, with modifications, on PLAINTIFFS MAHESH GOGRI and SHILPA GOGRI's Motion To Compel Scottsdale Insurance Company's Further Responses And Produce Additional Documents To The First Set Of Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions is grant that part of plaintiffs' motion which seeks to compel further responses to Special Interrogatories. Defendant's counsel produced responsive documents before the hearing. The Court notes plaintiff's separate statement did not address special interrogatories Nos. 7 & 8, therefore the motion to compel will be denied as to these 2 interrogatories. Ther remainder of the motion is granted as is plaintiff's request for sanction in the amount of $1,330.25. Prevailing party to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
